classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪区域展示了电机法兰的正视图，包含明确的机械结构尺寸标注：法兰外形尺寸 '□42.2'、安装孔距 '□31±0.2'、输出轴直径 'Φ22 +0/-0.05'、四个安装孔规格 '4-M3▽4min'、通孔直径 'Φ8 +0.2/-0 ▽thru'、引出线长度 '320±20'，以及线缆规格 'UL3265 AWG26'。图中包含法兰轮廓、安装孔位置、轴径公差、定位尺寸等典型机械尺寸图纸特征，符合 mechanical_dimensions 类别定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: Square symbol retained, dimension of outer envelope
Corrected ?22 to Φ22, shaft diameter nominal
Corrected ?8 to Φ8, mounting hole diameter nominal

terminology_notes: ▽ symbol denotes depth or countersink indicator
translation_notes: UL3265 is a wire insulation standard
AWG26 is American Wire Gauge size 26

dimension_records.reason: Clear dimension line with square symbol indicating outer flange envelope
Square pattern dimension for mounting hole centers with bilateral tolerance
Shaft diameter with asymmetric tolerance, combined from nominal, upper and lower deviation
Through-hole diameter with asymmetric tolerance, 4 locations per mounting pattern

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: 4× M3 tapped holes, minimum depth 4 mm
dimension_records.reason: Tapped hole count, thread size and minimum engagement depth specification
Wire harness lead length dimension with bilateral tolerance
Wire type standard and gauge specification for electrical connections

frontend_table_records.specification: 4× M3 tapped holes, minimum depth 4 mm

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: 42.2 mm square flange with 31±0.2 mm square mounting hole pattern. Four Φ8 +0.2/-0 through-holes for fasteners. Four M3 tapped holes with minimum 4 mm depth.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Φ22 +0/-0.05 mm output shaft with tight tolerance control.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall flange footprint is 42.2 mm square. Mounting pattern allows standard NEMA 17 compatible installation.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Electrical connection via UL3265 AWG26 wire leads, length 320±20 mm.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No keyway dimensions visible in this region. No datum reference frames or geometric tolerancing symbols detected. Shaft length not specified in this view.

unresolved_items.issue: OCR detected overlapping readings '22±8.05' and '22+8.05' in same region as Φ22 shaft callout. These appear to be misreads of the tolerance stack and were rejected in favor of clearer separate tolerance annotations.
unresolved_items.recommendation: Confirmed Φ22 +0/-0.05 from separate high-confidence OCR fragments ocr_004, ocr_005, ocr_007

unresolved_items.issue: OCR fragment '∅5' detected with high confidence but no corresponding dimension line or feature visible at that location. May be misread scale mark or image artifact.
unresolved_items.recommendation: Rejected as no engineering feature supports this dimension

unresolved_items.issue: OCR fragments '人8±0.2thru' and '8+0.t' overlap with the Φ8 hole callout region. '人' is likely misread Φ symbol, and '.t' is likely part of 'thru'.
unresolved_items.recommendation: Resolved to Φ8 +0.2/-0 thru using highest confidence fragments

unresolved_items.issue: Low-confidence fragments '7' and 'L' in tolerance region, likely OCR noise from leader lines or dimension line endpoints.
Multiple low-confidence Chinese character fragments ('一', 'm', '三', '0') detected in wire lead region with no clear engineering callout. May be printing artifacts or shadow edges.
unresolved_items.recommendation: Rejected as confidence too low and no visible corresponding text in source image

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标图像为电机规格参数表，包含电机相数、步距角、额定相电流、相电阻、相电感、保持力矩、转子惯量、绝缘等级、绝缘电阻、温升和电机重量等电机基本物理参数和电气参数。完整源图显示这是机械图纸右下角的电机规格表格，与机械尺寸图纸配套使用，用于定义电机的物理和电气特性。虽然该表格主要展示电气参数，但其作为机械图纸的配套说明，并包含转子惯量、电机重量等机械物理参数，属于机械尺寸类图纸的规格说明部分。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 该图显示了步进电机的励磁顺序表，列出了四组相线的名称和线色（'红 A+'、'红白 A-'、'绿 B+'、'绿白 B-'），并标注了顺时针和逆时针旋转时各相线的励磁极性（+/-）及励磁顺序，明确定义了动力接线的线色、相序和极性关系，符合动力连接器针脚定义的特征。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该目标区域仅包含标题性文字'电气原理图'，指向整张图纸的主题。虽然完整图纸包含电机外形尺寸、电气接线信息和参数表，但目标裁剪区域本身不含几何图形、尺寸标注或曲线数据，仅为图纸标题。在现有四个类别中，mechanical_dimensions 最接近该目标所处的工程图纸上下文，因为图纸标题通常标识整张图纸的主要内容类型，而该图纸主体包含机械外形和尺寸信息。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标图像显示电机绕组接线示意图，包含 'A+' 和 'A-' 标识表示电源极性或相线连接，中间标注字母 'M' 代表电机，图中展示了线圈绕组和端子连接关系，符合动力连接器针脚定义的特征，明确标识了电源正负极或相线端子与电机的对应关系

terminology_notes: A+/A- represent phase A coil polarity

dimension_records.reason: Phase A positive terminal marking for stepper motor wiring
Phase A negative terminal marking for stepper motor wiring
Motor symbol indicating the stepper motor component in wiring diagram

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Stepper motor wiring diagram shows Phase A terminals (A+ and A-) connected to motor coil. Standard bipolar stepper motor wiring convention.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Other phase terminals (B+/B-) not visible in this region. Complete wiring information requires full diagram.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence overlapping OCR noise near A+ label, likely misread of part of A+ character or background artifact

Very low confidence (0.059), likely misread from coil illustration geometry, no clear visible text
Medium-low confidence, appears to be false detection from lower coil winding illustration, no actual text visible
Detected at bottom of image, likely terminal/connector symbol misread, no clear dimensional text visible
Detected near bottom connector symbols, medium confidence but no clear corresponding text visible in wiring diagram

quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
